steps.t: Slain Orcs and Uruk-hai can be found in the Circle of Despair. You should search fallen Orcs and Uruk-hai for orders from Ugrukhôr. <rgb=#FF0000&gt…
Slain Orcs and Uruk-hai can be found in the Circle of Despair. You should search fallen Orcs and Uruk-hai for orders from Ugrukhôr. <rgb=#FF0000&gt…
